title: Repurposed Structures - Better Jungle Temples Compat
description: Change RS Temples to be in Better Jungle Temple's style
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Yung's Better Jungle Temples. This datapack will make Repurposed Structures's temples be in the style of Better Jungle Temple's Structure. That means some puzzles and mazes!

- Yung's Better Jungle Temples mod can be obtained from here:
  - https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-jungle-temples
 
- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: 
  - https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge
  - https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gAvG8ZeC/images/f0b2cb2ebb90f3b8201dcdbace8e40b599b54228.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gAvG8ZeC/images/f0b2cb2ebb90f3b8201dcdbace8e40b599b54228.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
